note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Zea Mays Starch
description: Cornstarch (or corn starch) is the starch derived from the corn kernel. Starch is obtained from the endosperm of the kernel. It is used primarily in cosmetics for its absorbent and mattifying properties.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Zinc Acetate
description: Zinc Acetate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Zinc Citrate
description: Zinc citrate is mainly used in oral hygiene products as an antimicrobial agent. It works particularly well with Triclosan (although this ingredient is particularly controversial and suspected to be an endocrine disruptor). It is also an active against scale that can support the action of fluoride.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Zinc Chloride
description: Zinc Chloride — косметический ингредиент.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Zea Mays Silk Extract
description: Zea Mays Silk Extract — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Vegetal.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Zinc Pca
description: Zinc PCA is in the form of a white powder. This ingredient is known as sweet. It is used for its seboregulating properties (even anti-dandruff). It is also indicated for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties to combat acne and various skin problems. It is authorized in organic.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Natural.

name: Zinc Pyrithione
description: Zinc pyrithione has been banned in cosmetics in Europe since March 1, 2022.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Zinc Stearate
description: White dye
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Zinc Sulfate
description: Zinc sulfate is a chemical compound created from Zinc and sulfuric acid. It is used primarily as an antimicrobial agent in bath products, dental care and hygiene products.Zinc sulfate is highly ecotoxic (Aquatic Acute 1, Aquatic Chronic 1) according to REACH.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Zirconium Dioxide
description: Zirconium Dioxide — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Zirconium Silicate
description: Zirconium Silicate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

name: Zinc Gluconate
description: Zinc Gluconate is used in cosmetics for its antiseptic and astringent properties. It is often used in acne treatment products, it accelerates the healing of wounds and helps the body to transform essential fatty acids used by the skin for healing. It is also found in deodorants and toothpastes.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Zinc Oxide
description: Zinc oxide is a mineral used in cosmetics as a white colourant (CI 77947) or as a UV filter. Its authorisation as a UV filter is recent, following a European Union directive in April 2016. It allowed for organic use."On 23 September 2014, the Scientific Committee on Consumer Safety (SCCS) concluded that zinc oxide is safe when used as a colourant in its non-nano uncoated form in cosmetic products for applicationapplication. However, the SCCS also considered that, given the pulmonary inflammation caused by zinc oxide particles after inhalation, zinc oxide in cosmetic products likely to expose the consumer's lungs to zinc oxide by inhalation is a cause for concern". : Extract from the EU regulation of 3 August 2017.Following this opinion, Europe has banned all use of Zinc Oxide in spray cosmetics since 24 February 2018.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Mineral.

name: Zinc Glutamate
description: Zinc Glutamate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.

note: Low penalty in all categories. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании.
